name: orange-tv
description: Orange TV monorepo root dev orchestration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n launcher,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:launcher" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix launcher install && dotnet restore api/OrangeTv.Api.csproj && dotnet tool restore
scripts.build: npm --prefix launcher run build && dotnet build api/OrangeTv.Api.csproj
scripts.test:all: npm --prefix launcher test && npm --prefix launcher run test:electron && dotnet test orange-tv.sln
scripts.verify: npm --prefix launcher run lint && npm --prefix launcher test && npm --prefix launcher run test:electron && dotnet test orange-tv.sln
